domain: Marshallese stick charts (memorized BEFORE voyage; NOT consulted during; 4 canonical ocean-swell patterns memorized; runtime navigation by body sense + internal memory)
specific_mechanism: Memorize a SMALL CANONICAL SET of patterns before deployment; do NOT consult external references during deployment; runtime inference combines memorized prototypes with live sensory input.
llm_application: STICK-CHART-INTERNALIZE: a SMALL-K-PROTOTYPE pretraining + retrieval-free deployment regime: (i) curate K canonical PATTERN PROTOTYPES (e.g., K=4 ocean-swell analogs: rilib, kaelib, bungdockerik, bundockeing → 4 canonical reasoning templates); (ii) heavily fine-tune to internalize these K prototypes; (iii) at deployment EXPLICITLY DISABLE all retrieval/RAG/web-tool access; (iv) runtime inference combines memorized prototypes with current input only. Trades expressive power for guaranteed-no-leakage retrieval-free behavior. Useful in air-gapped/sovereign deployments where retrieval is forbidden.
novelty_claim: Standard fine-tuning teaches everything. RAG + tool-use augments runtime. LoRA + adapters specialize. Retrieval-free LLMs exist but are not trained on a *deliberately small canonical prototype set*. STICK-CHART-INTERNALIZE differs by EXPLICIT K-PROTOTYPE CURATION + RETRIEVAL-FREE DEPLOYMENT DISCIPLINE + IN-CONTEXT-ONLY runtime combination. Closest is offline-LLM / on-device / no-RAG configurations but those don't enforce small-K prototype discipline.
